notes:
NovaPanel v0.6.53

- release-update.js: hardcoded fallback paths (C:\np-duel\novapanel-updates, C:\np-exe) so no env vars required.
- latest-version.json notes is now a STRING not an array — matches what updater.js expects.
- Git commit message changed to 'update to vX.Y.Z' (matching repo convention).
- Step 9: optional auto-deploy to C:\np-exe via PowerShell Expand-Archive with wrapper-folder flattening.
- Removed all 'copy file manually' fallback text — script aborts with clear error if updates repo is missing.
- All manual steps eliminated from the release workflow.
